turns.assistantContent: The test at line 291 reads from `{tmpDir}/{childSemanticId}/session.json` but the child (with `parentSessionId`) is correctly placed at `{tmpDir}/{parentSemanticId}/subsessions/{childSemanticId}/session.json` — matching the requirement and the other passing test at line 346. This is a test path bug. Fixing it:
